description: Begin the New Year with a comprehensive look back at your SaaS journey using our intuitive email template. Designed to enhance user experience, this template aids in creating a detailed year in review, allowing you to highlight key achievements, milestones, and software updates. Ideal for software and technology firms, it helps demonstrate the value of your products, driving engagement and customer loyalty. It's also a perfect fit for the Apps & Downloads sector, providing an interactive platform to showcase your app's yearly progress and success. With a focus on the New Year, this template serves as a compelling year-end wrap up, setting the stage for a successful year ahead.
short_description: Start the New Year by reviewing your SaaS journey using our user-friendly email template. Ideal for software, technology, and Apps & Downloads sectors, it offers a detailed year in review, highlighting milestones and updates. Perfect for your New Year wrap-up and setting the stage for success ahead.

designer.description: I am a Chicago-based graphic designer. I specialize in working with natural brands. I can work with you remotely or in-person as your creative partner to tackle branding and marketing projects of any format, digital or print. Let's make something amazing together.

html_data:
LOG IN

We’re saying Goodbye 2020

This year has been an unprecedented one to say the least. Thanks for your support in helping us get through this. Here’s a quick rewind of everything that happened at UxApp.

READ MORE →

NEW! Features Launched This Year at UxApp

This year has been an unprecedented one to say the least. Thanks for your support in helping us get through this. Here’s a quick rewind of everything that happened at UxApp.

 

New color tools

Pick any color. and create stunning gradients for your UxApp elements

READ MORE →

Client review made easy.

Users can now comment on projects. making review painless.

READ MORE →

Prototypes just got better!

With live prototypes, your changes are updated in real-time. No more uploading and syncing!

READ MORE →
 

UX-CONNECT 2020

◄◄ REWIND

Over 60,000 creatives, entrepreneurs, and developers, joined us online this year for the UX-CONNECT 2020 conference. Here are some of the highlights.

 

Björn Uppland

How UX is shaping the cities of the future

 

Brian Park

Rethinking UX Design for 2020 and beyond

Our Blog | Attend a Webinar | Call Us
 
 
 

Don’t want to receive these? click here to unsubscribe.
